test.name: Add Pet

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petapi, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet path_url=/v2/pet headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '158', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": 55, "category": {"id": 55, "name": "ubantu"}, "name": "ubantu", "photoUrls": ["string"], "tags": [{"id": 55, "name": "ubantu"}], "status": "available"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.doc: Add a new pet to the store

test.name: Update Pet

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petapi, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Load Json From File
kw.doc: Load JSON from file.

kw.name: PUT On Session
kw.msg: PUT Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet path_url=/v2/pet headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '156', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"id": 55, "category": {"id": 55, "name": "Updated"}, "name": "Updated", "photoUrls": ["string"], "tags": [{"id": 55, "name": "updated"}], "status": "sold"}'
kw.doc: Sends a PUT request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petapi, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg:
POST Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet/55/uploadImage path_url=/v2/pet/55/uploadImage headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '6465', 'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data; boundary=8d647272b745567856a26922ff79d082'} body=b'--8d647272b745567856a26922ff79d082
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="additionalMetadata"

Sample image for pet
--8d647272b745567856a26922ff79d082
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="ubantu_image.jpg"

'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Upload an image for a pet

test.name: Update Pet With Form Data

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petapi, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet/55 path_url=/v2/pet/55 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '34', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=name=FormUpdatedPet&status=pending
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: Updates a pet in the store with form data

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=petapi, url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: DELETE On Session
kw.msg: DELETE Request : url=https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet/55 path_url=/v2/pet/55 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.4', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a DELETE request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
